pageContext.name: The Holiday Maid Monica Tesia
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Gantaku Anime are proud to bring you The Holiday Maid Monica Tesia Statue!  Presented in stunning 1:4 scale, the lovely Monica was created with high attention to detail, from glass eyeballs to her hand-painted eyelashes that allow for a realistic and welcoming expression. With the option to display her with a mahogany or marble banister as well as an included grey-hair attachment, collectors can style her in a variety of ways, each just as pretty as the next!  This Sideshow Exclusive version also comes with an additional set of leg stockings and wrist bracelets, allowing you to adorn her as you please!  This limited-edition statue is the first in her series from Gantaku Anime and would make an amazing addition to any collection! Invite Monica home today!
